# PicklrLab — The World's #1 Pickleball Authority
# https://picklrlab.com

## About
PicklrLab is the leading source for professional pickleball rankings, lab-tested paddle reviews, tournament news, player profiles, and training resources. We cover PPA Tour, MLP, PPA Asia, and Southeast Asian pickleball.

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://picklrlab.com/
- Player Rankings: https://picklrlab.com/rankings
- Paddle Reviews: https://picklrlab.com/reviews
- Latest News: https://picklrlab.com/news
- Player Profiles: https://picklrlab.com/players
- Tournament Schedule: https://picklrlab.com/tournaments
- Training Tools: https://picklrlab.com/tools

## Content Types
- Player profiles with career stats and rankings
- Lab-tested paddle reviews with scoring methodology
- Tournament results and analysis
- Training drills and technique guides
- Southeast Asian pickleball coverage

## Data
- Rankings updated weekly (Monday)
- News articles published daily
- Paddle reviews with 7-metric scoring system
- Coverage of 50+ professional players

## Contact
Email: hello@picklrlab.com
